author: Timothy H. Norman
consent: SVCT architecture, methodology, and non-PHI artifacts may be shared with xAI or any party that respects provenance, four pillars (content · context · data · time.time), and Do No Harm First.
shareable: Public X posts and outreach already attributed
GitHub repo svct-share-redacted (public, no NDA gate)
not_shareable_without_redaction: Personal email, phone, subscriber IDs from lab OCR
recipient_requirements: Preserve provenance blocks on ingest; do not collapse into anonymous embeddings
INCOMPLETE / Shepherd tier for degraded data — never pollute canonical spine
Paste the artifact, not the verdict
No training on medical PHI without explicit separate consent

nda.process: DocuSign — either party may propose; author signs recipient envelope within 24h and reciprocates when used
nda.use_when: deeper confidential exchange or medical pipeline discussion — not for public redacted repo review

contact_path: contact@x.ai with @Timothy01775634 attribution; or X post with repo link

bundle_artifacts.medical_handling: stripped/redacted; category stub retained; PHI local only

note: Witness only — does not auto-publish. User retains rights; recipients must honor provenance chain.
